title: Operations & Growth Lead (Education)
description:
Operations & Growth Lead (Education)

Company: JF Smart Learning
Location: Singapore (Hybrid / On-site as needed)
Employment Type: Full-time
Start Date: Flexible (ASAP preferred)

About JF Smart Learning

JF Smart Learning is a premium education and learning studio in Singapore, specialising in high-quality STEM, STEAM, and academic programmes for children and adolescents. Founded by experienced international educators, we are known for our strong pedagogy, personalised approach, and excellent outcomes for students and families.

As the organisation enters its next phase of growth, we are seeking a capable, driven Operations & Growth Lead to take ownership of day-to-day operations and help scale the business locally.

The Role

This is a senior, hands-on role suited to someone who enjoys building systems, leading people, and driving growth in an education-focused environment.

You will work closely with the founders and gradually take responsibility for the local leadership and operational management of the business.

Key Responsibilities

  • Oversee daily operations of the centre, including scheduling, staffing, and programme delivery

  • Manage parent communications, enrolments, and customer experience

  • Lead and support teaching staff to ensure quality, consistency, and professionalism

  • Drive growth through lead conversion, partnerships, and programme expansion

  • Implement and improve operational systems (CRM, scheduling, processes)

  • Monitor key metrics including revenue, retention, and utilisation

  • Ensure smooth, professional running of the centre in line with JF Smart Learning’s brand and values

Who We Are Looking For

We are looking for someone who is:

  • A strong organiser and problem-solver

  • Comfortable taking ownership and making decisions

  • Calm, professional, and trusted by parents and staff

  • Motivated by building something meaningful, not just “doing a job”

Essential Requirements

  • Experience in education, training, enrichment, or a related service industry

  • Proven ability to manage operations, people, and processes

  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills

  • Ability to work independently and take responsibility

  • Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident (preferred for government support schemes)

Desirable

  • Experience in tuition centres, enrichment schools, or education start-ups

  • Familiarity with CRM systems, scheduling software, or SME operations

  • Interest in education, learning, and child development

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary based on experience

  • Performance-based bonus structure

  • Opportunity to grow into a senior leadership role

  • Direct mentorship from experienced international educators

  • A chance to shape and scale a respected education brand in Singapore

This role has genuine long-term growth potential for the right person.

How to Apply

Please submit your CV and a short cover note explaining:

  • Why this role interests you

  • Your experience in operations, education, or growth-focused roles

Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.

postedCompany.description:
Welcome to JF Smart Learning, where we believe that every student has the potential to excel academically and grow into confident, lifelong learners. Specializing in personalized STEM tutoring for IBDP, IGCSE, and A-Level students, we are dedicated to helping students achieve their academic goals through our unique and research-backed G.A.P. Method—Gauge, Analyze, Perfect.

Our Services

In addition to our personalized tutoring, JF Smart Learning offers a wide range of educational services:

  • STEM and STEAM Enrichment Workshops: We provide engaging, hands-on workshops that ignite curiosity and creativity in students aged 5 to 18. Our holiday camps and weekend sessions allow young learners to explore Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Mathematics in a fun, dynamic environment.
  • Internal Assessment (IA) and Extended Essay (EE) Support: Our experienced educators offer guidance and mentoring for students working on their IAs and EEs, ensuring they meet the rigorous standards required by the IBDP while building confidence and research skills.
  • Talks for Parents: We believe in empowering families to support their children’s education. That’s why we offer insightful talks for parents, providing strategies for fostering a positive learning environment at home.

Why Choose Us?

At JF Smart Learning, we go beyond traditional tutoring by offering a comprehensive, supportive learning experience. Our expert educators are not only highly qualified but deeply invested in the holistic development of each child. Many of our teachers are international examiners, published content creators, and specialists in their respective fields, bringing a wealth of knowledge and expertise to every session.

Here’s what makes us different:

  • Personalized Learning: Every student is unique, and our approach ensures that lessons are customized to meet individual needs and learning styles. No more one-size-fits-all tutoring—our sessions are tailored specifically to help your child succeed.
  • Proven Methods: Our G.A.P. Method is backed by research and designed to maximize student progress. By identifying and focusing on learning gaps, we help students gain a deeper understanding of the material, build academic confidence, and achieve higher results.
  • Holistic Development: We don’t just focus on academics; we’re committed to nurturing well-rounded, confident learners. Our supportive environment encourages students to take ownership of their education, think critically, and develop skills that will serve them throughout their lives.
  • Engaging Programs for Younger Learners: For younger students, our STEM and STEAM workshops are designed to be exciting and interactive, helping children discover a passion for learning through creative challenges, experiments, and exploration.

Our Mission

Our mission at JF Smart Learning is to empower students to achieve academic excellence through personalized instruction and a passion for STEM learning. We are dedicated to helping each student unlock their full potential, both in and out of the classroom, by providing high-quality, targeted education that builds confidence, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills.

Join Us

Whether your child needs personalized tutoring to excel in IBDP, IGCSE, or A-Level exams, or you’re looking for engaging enrichment programs to ignite their curiosity, JF Smart Learning is here to help. Contact us today to find out how we can support your child’s learning journey and help them reach new heights of academic success!
postedCompany.name: JF SMART LEARNING PTE. LTD.
